title: Settings

skillsHub.title: Skills Hub
skillsHub.description: Centrally manage AI agent skills. Install once, use across all assistants.
skillsHub.noSkills: No skills found. Import some to get started.
skillsHub.tipContent: Skills configured here can be enabled for any assistant in the "Assistants" setup page; skills are imported using symbolic links.
skillsHub.deleteConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
skillsHub.recommendSuccess: Recommended successfully: {{count}} skills selected based on rules
skillsHub.noRecommendations: No matching skills found, please select manually

claudeYoloModeDesc: Bypass all Claude Code permission checks (equivalent to --dangerously-skip-permissions).
customCssDesc: Enter custom CSS styles here to modify the interface appearance. The system will automatically add !important to ensure highest priority. Changes will take effect immediately.
pdfToPptAssistantDesc: Convert PDF to PPT with watermark removal rules.
game3dAssistantDesc: Generate a complete 3D platform collection game in one HTML file.
assistantDescriptionPlaceholder: What can this assistant help with?
assistantsListDescription: Build task-specific assistants by combining an AI agent with custom rules and skills.
searchAssistants: Search assistants by name or description
assistantNoMatch: No assistants match the current filters.
assistantPromptHint: Enter rules for this assistant. Note: Gemini currently only supports rules.
assistantRulesHint: Define additional rules for assistant behavior.
assistantModelsHint: Select which models this assistant can use.
assistantSkillsHint: List preferred tools/skills for the assistant.
deleteAssistantConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? This action cannot be undone.
skillPathPlaceholder: Enter or browse skill folder path(s), separated by comma
pleaseSelectSkillPath: Please select a skill folder path
deletePendingSkillConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? This skill has not been imported yet.
deletePendingSkillNote: This will only remove the skill from the pending list. You can add it again using the "Add Skills" feature.
removeCustomSkillConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from this assistant?
removeCustomSkillNote: This will only remove the skill from this assistant. The skill will remain in the builtin skills and can be added back later.
delete_preset_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this preset?

cssTheme.selectOrCustomize: Select preset theme or custom CSS
cssTheme.name: Name
cssTheme.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this theme? This action cannot be undone.

autoPreviewOfficeFilesDesc: Automatically open newly created Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files in the current project. Office temporary lock files are ignored.
startOnBootDesc: Launch AionUi automatically when you sign in to macOS or Windows.
startOnBootUnsupported: Available only in packaged macOS and Windows apps.
startOnBootUpdateFailed: Failed to update start on boot setting
hardwareAccelerationDesc: Use the GPU to render the UI. Disable if the app crashes on launch or graphics flicker.
hardwareAccelerationAutoDisabled: Disabled automatically after repeated GPU crashes.
hardwareAccelerationRestartConfirm: Restart AionUi to apply the new hardware acceleration setting?
hardwareAccelerationUpdateFailed: Failed to update hardware acceleration setting
agentIdleTimeoutDesc: Kill idle agent processes after this duration to free memory
fullUrlHint: Use this address directly, no path appended
deleteModelConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
deleteAllModelConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all models?
pleaseEnterBaseUrlAndApiKey: Please enter base url and api key
multiApiKeyTip: 💡 To add multiple API Keys for auto-rotation, configure in platform edit later
multiApiKeyEditTip: Support multiple API Keys, one per line, system will auto-rotate
apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter API Key(s), one per line for multiple keys
customModelSupportNote: Note: Only Aion CLI currently supports custom models.
addModelHint: Pick or type a model ID and it will be appended to this provider.
addModelNoExisting: No models have been added for this provider yet. They will appear here once added.
addModelTips: You can paste any model name directly. Keep it consistent with the provider console for best compatibility.
modelProtocolTip: Choose the API request format for this model. new-api gateway will route to the upstream using the selected protocol.

bedrock.regionHint: Select the AWS region for Bedrock models
bedrock.connectionSuccess: Connection successful! AWS credentials are valid.
bedrock.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check your credentials.
bedrock.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields first.

restartConfirm: Changes will restart the application. Continue?
fontSizeDescription: Adjust the UI zoom level so the entire interface matches your preferred size.
webui.description: Use AionUi as your "24/7 Remote Assistant" - arrange tasks from any remote device, anytime, anywhere.
webui.steps: Step 1. Turn on WebUI; Step 2. Copy the access URL; Step 3. Open in remote browser
webui.enableDesc: Start the web service to allow browser access
webui.allowRemoteDesc: Use remote software/server for secure remote access
webui.qrLoginHint: Scan the QR code with your phone to log in automatically on mobile browser
webui.initialPasswordDesc: Password generated on first startup, please change it
webui.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
webui.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
webui.passwordTooLong: Password must be less than 128 characters long
webui.passwordTooCommon: Password is too common, please choose a stronger one
webui.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
webui.usernameMaxLength: Username must be 32 characters or less
webui.usernameFormatError: Use letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores only
webui.usernameEdgeError: Username cannot start or end with a hyphen or underscore
webui.resetPasswordTooltip: Forgot password? Click to set a new one (no current password required)
webui.resetPasswordHint: Forgot your password? Click "Reset" to generate a new random password
webui.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset. New password is shown above
webui.passwordResetAndCopied: Password reset and copied to clipboard
webui.passwordResetAndFilled: Password reset and filled in form, please save
webui.passwordHint: Password is shown in console on first startup. Use "Change Password" to reset
webui.checkConsoleForPassword: Check application console for initial password
webui.browserNotSupported: WebUI settings not available in browser
webui.browserNotSupportedDesc: For security reasons, WebUI settings can only be managed in the desktop application. Please open the settings panel in AionUi desktop app to configure.
webui.passwordOnlyFirstTime: Password is only shown on first startup and will be hidden afterwards
webui.resetPasswordWarning: Please keep the reset password safe!
webui.featureRemoteDesc: Enable WebUI so your phone or remote browser can access AionUi.
webui.featureChannelsDesc: Connect Telegram, Lark, DingTalk, and WeChat to interact with AionUi from IM apps.
assistant.botTokenDesc: Open Telegram, find @BotFather and send /newbot to get your Bot Token.
assistant.enableBotDesc: Start the Telegram bot to receive messages
assistant.tokenLocked: Please close the Channel and delete all authorized users before modifying the configuration
assistant.defaultModelDesc: Model used for Telegram conversations. Default uses GEMINI CLI as Agent
assistant.step1: Open Telegram and search for your bot
assistant.step2: Send any message or click /start to initiate pairing
assistant.step3: A pairing request will appear below. Click "Approve" to authorize the user.
assistant.step4: Once approved, you can start chatting with Gemini through Telegram!
channels.title: Channels
channels.telegramDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via Telegram
channels.slackDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via Slack
channels.discordDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via Discord
channels.larkDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via Lark
channels.dingtalkDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via DingTalk
channels.weixinDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via WeChat
channels.wecomDesc: Chat with AionUi assistant via WeCom (Enterprise WeChat AI Bot)
channels.guide: Connect Telegram, Lark, DingTalk and more to control your always-on AionUi AI agent from any chat app.
channels.selectFirst: Select a channel and configure credentials.
channels.enableAfterConfig: Enable the channel and start chatting with your AI agent.
channels.mediaPathNotAllowed: Couldn't send {{name}} because the file is outside the allowed send directories
imageGenerationDescription: Choose which configured image-capable model the tool should use by default.
speechToTextDescription: Configure the voice input provider used by the chat box on desktop and WebUI.
noAvailable: No available image models, please configure first.
mcpDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?
mcpImportPlaceholder: Copy the JSON configuration from the MCP service introduction page (preferably NPX or UVX configuration) and paste it into the input box below.
mcpImportTip1: Use a valid JSON object with a top-level "mcpServers" field.
mcpImportTip2: Each server should define either "command" (stdio) or "url" (http/sse).
mcpImportTip3: Multiple servers can be imported at once.
mcpImportDescription: AionUi will automatically retrieve the MCP installed in your CLI Agent and import it with one click
mcpSyncFailedNoAgents: No available agents detected, unable to sync MCP configuration
mcpDeletedWithCleanup: MCP server deleted and configuration cleaned up

cdp.title: CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol)
cdp.enableDesc: Expose a local CDP endpoint for browser debugging and MCP integration.
cdp.mcpConfigHint: Paste this into your MCP client config to connect to local Chrome DevTools.
cdp.restartRequired: CDP startup setting changed. Restart is required to apply.
cdp.playwrightMcpConfigHint: Use Playwright MCP to connect via CDP endpoint, with accessibility snapshots and browser automation.

needHelpConfigGuide: Need help? Check out the detailed
needHelpTooltip: If you need help, please check
googleCloudProjectPlaceholder: Enter your Google Cloud Project ID
appDescription: One desktop. Your AI agents, actually coworking.
bugReportModulePlaceholder: Select the module related to the issue
bugReportDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail, including steps to reproduce
bugReportScreenshotDropzoneText: Click, drag, or paste screenshots here
bugReportAutoInfo: System info and logs from the last 3 days will be automatically attached to help us locate the issue faster
backendStartupFailureMessage: AionUi couldn't start the local core service, so the app can't continue.
backendStartupFailureDetail: Restart the app and try again. If the problem continues, send a diagnostic report with recent logs to help us investigate.
backendStartupFailureReportSentMessage: Thanks. The report includes startup diagnostics and recent logs.
backendStartupFailureReportFailedMessage: The diagnostic report couldn't be sent. Please restart AionUi and try again.
bugReportSuccess: Report submitted, thank you for your feedback
bugReportError: Submission failed, please try again later
bugReportModuleSkillsDescription: For issues with the Skills Market, built-in or external skills, plugin install and enable flows, load failures, or plugin execution.
bugReportModuleWebuiDescription: For issues with WebUI startup, remote access, QR login, account or password changes, or browser-side behavior.
bugReportModuleMcpDescription: For issues with MCP server config, OAuth login, tool sync, missing tools, or tool invocation failures.
bugReportModuleChannelDescription: For issues with Telegram, Slack, Lark and other channel plugins, including config, pairing, authorization, or message delivery.
bugReportModuleChatDescription: For issues while sending messages, receiving agent replies, handling context, using the command queue, or other in-chat behavior.
bugReportModuleScheduledTaskDescription: For issues with creating, editing, triggering, reminding, or executing scheduled tasks.
bugReportModuleLlmConfigDescription: For issues with model providers, API keys, login and authentication, rate limits, quotas, or model selection.
bugReportModuleAssistantDescription: For issues with assistant cards, presets, switching defaults, or assistant behavior settings.
bugReportModulePermissionDescription: For issues where local or remote agents are not detected, unavailable, unhealthy, or fail to connect or complete a handshake.
bugReportModuleSessionDescription: For issues with search, history, rename, pin, delete, or how conversation lists are displayed.
bugReportModuleWorkspaceDescription: For issues with projects, uploads, folder selection, Office files, preview panels, or diff views.
bugReportModuleAgentTeamDescription: For issues with team creation, leader or teammate coordination, task dispatch, or team message flow.
bugReportModuleDisplaySettingsDescriptio: For issues with theme, scaling, UI styles, window display, or desktop pet presentation.
bugReportModuleSystemSettingsDescription: For issues with system permissions, launch at startup, notifications, storage paths, or platform integration.
bugReportModuleOtherDescription: Use this when the issue spans multiple modules, or when you are not sure which category fits best.
deleteCustomAgentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom agent?
customAcpAgentJsonDescription: Paste your custom agent configuration JSON below
customAcpAgentTip2: name: Display name shown in the agent selector
noCliDetected: No CLI tools detected. Please install an ACP-compatible CLI first.
agentNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for this agent
commandHelp: The executable command to run the agent CLI
argsHelp: Space-separated arguments passed to the command
testConnectionSuccess: Connection successful! CLI exists and ACP protocol is working.
testConnectionFailCli: Command not found. Make sure it is installed and in your PATH.
testConnectionFailAcp: CLI found but ACP initialization failed.
simpleModeTip: Select a detected CLI and give it a custom name. Switch to Advanced mode for environment variables and other options.
agentModelSettingsTooltip: Configure default models for each AI agent. Models will be injected when starting new conversations.
agentModelNote: Note: Model changes will take effect in new conversations.
agentModelCustomNote: You can also enter any custom model ID supported by the agent.
protocolOpenAICompatible: Detected OpenAI-compatible protocol, configuration is correct
protocolSwitchSuggestion: Detected {{protocol}} protocol, consider switching to {{platform}} for better support
protocolTimeout: Connection timeout, please check network or API URL
protocolInvalidKey: Invalid API Key, please check your key
protocolCheckConfig: Unable to identify API protocol, please check configuration
packyapiOpenAIDetected: PackyAPI: Detected OpenAI format. For Claude format, remove /v1 from URL and select Anthropic platform
packyapiAnthropicDetected: PackyAPI: Detected Claude format. For OpenAI format, add /v1 to URL and select OpenAI/Custom platform
noSkillsFound: No valid skills found in the selected path(s)

weixin.scanPrompt: Please scan the QR code with WeChat
weixin.loginExpired: QR code expired, please try again

weixin.step2: A pairing request will appear below. Click "Approve" to authorize the user.

weixin.loginRequired: Please login with WeChat QR code first

wecom.callbackHint: Production usually requires a public HTTPS URL reachable by WeCom. Start WebUI first; use a reverse proxy or tunnel if needed.
wecom.tokenDesc: Must match the Token in the WeCom bot callback configuration
wecom.encodingAesKeyDesc: 43-character key from WeCom (AES encryption for callbacks)
wecom.credentialsSaved: Credentials already configured. Enter new values to update.
wecom.configureFirst: Please save Token and EncodingAESKey first
wecom.step1: Configure the callback URL in WeCom admin to match your WebUI base + /channels/wecom/webhook
wecom.step2: Send any message to the bot in WeCom to start pairing
wecom.step3: A pairing request will appear below. Click "Approve" to authorize the user.
wecom.step4: Once approved, you can chat with the AI assistant through WeCom.
wecom.waitingConnection: Ensure WebUI is running so WeCom can reach the callback URL.

extensionAssistantReadonly: Extension assistants are read-only. You can duplicate it and edit the copy.

agentManagement.localAgentsDescription: Aion CLI is the built-in agent and ships with the app — no install needed. Other agents are detected only after their CLI is installed locally.
agentManagement.remoteAgentsDescription: Only remote OpenClaw connections are supported for now. Other agents are in development.
agentManagement.marketEmpty: No installable agents found. Check your network connection and make sure GitHub is reachable.
agentManagement.marketContributionHint: Want a new Agent listed here?
agentManagement.customEmpty: No custom agents configured. Click "Add Custom Agent" to create one.

remoteAgent.title: Remote Agents
remoteAgent.empty: No remote agents configured. Click "Add" to connect to a remote agent service.
remoteAgent.name: Name
remoteAgent.allowInsecureHint: Skip TLS certificate verification (for self-signed certificates)
remoteAgent.deleteConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
remoteAgent.pendingApprovalHint: Please approve this device on the OpenClaw Gateway
remoteAgent.pendingTimeout: Approval request expired (5 minutes). Please try again.
